svg.text: Multi-source discovery → analysis → output with runtime protection sidecar
Slack · Jira · ServiceNow · Drata · Vanta · Webhooks
EXTERNAL INTELLIGENCE FEEDS — 9 sources feed into Layer 2
SQLite (WAL) · PostgreSQL · Snowflake | RBAC + scrypt KDF | HMAC-SHA256 audit | Scheduler · Cache | Docker Hub · GHCR · Railway SSE · Helm
20 MCP clients · 11 providers · 10 agent fwks · 12 model formats · 7 ecosystems · 427+ registry · 107 modules · 2,900+ tests
Read-only · Agentless · Never stores credentials · Only package names sent to APIs · Sigstore signed · Apache 2.0
